# TextStrokeStyle

**Object**

The object for defining the stroke to use for an outline on text.

## Declaration

```swift
object TextStrokeStyle
```

## Discussion

Use the `TextStrokeStyle` object to define a text outline.

You can use this object in [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/TextStyle] and [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsFormat/ComponentTextStyle].

### Example

```json
{
  "componentTextStyles": {
    "exampleStyle": {
      …
      "stroke": {
        "color": "#000",
        "width": 3
      },
      "textColor": "#FFF",
      "fontSize": 30
    }
  }
}
```

## Text Effects

- **TextShadow**: The object for creating a text shadow.
- **TextShadowOffset**: The object for setting an offset value to use with a text shadow.
- **TextDecoration**: The object for defining color for text underline or strikethrough.
